Localization.Description: A device is added to a group or removed from a group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added device "{object.value}" to group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed device "{object.value}" from group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
